title: Spanish Paella Pasta Bake
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, combining the flavors of paella with the comfort of a pasta bake. Perfect for a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: paella
ingredients.amount: 1 cup store-bought or homemade paella seasoning

instructions: Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, paella seasoning, and cooked Spanish rice to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a large baking dish, combine the cooked pasta, tomato and rice mixture.
Stir to combine and top with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
